---
title: "ai-lab-investment"
subtitle: "Preliminary draft - Please do not circulate"
date: today
date-format: long
format:
  html:
    output-file: ai_lab_investment.html
  pdf:
    output-file: ai_lab_investment.pdf
authors:
  - name: Vincent Grégoire
    affil-id: 1
    affiliation:
      - ref: 1
affiliations:
  - id: 1
    name: HEC Montréal
abstract: "This paper..."
keywords:
  - keyword 1
  - keyword 2
thanks: "We thank ... ~~ Vincent Grégoire: HEC Montréal (vincent.gregoire@gmail.com)."
---


{{< include _introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include _data.qmd >}}

{{< include _conclusion.qmd >}}

\newpage
\clearpage

## References {.unnumbered}

\begingroup
\raggedright
::: {#refs}
:::
\endgroup
